response:
Hello and welcome! I'm thrilled to help you find an action-packed movie on Netflix!

I've got just the thing for you! Based on your request, I've curated a list of top action movies on Netflix that fit your criteria. Here are three movie recommendations:

1. Extraction (2020) - Starring Chris Hemsworth, this high-octane action-thriller follows a black-market mercenary who must rescue the kidnapped son of an international crime lord.

2. 6 Underground (2019) - With Ryan Reynolds starring, this Netflix original film is a non-stop adrenaline rush. The movie follows a tech billionaire who fakes his own death and becomes a vigilante to take down corrupt officials.

3. The Old Guard (2020) - Based on the bestselling graphic novel, this Netflix original film follows a group of immortal mercenaries who must fight to protect their secret. With Charlize Theron and Kiki Layne leading the charge, this movie is an action-packed thrill ride.

Hope you enjoy these recommendations!

• Extraction (2020) - 
• 6 Underground (2019) - 
• The Old Guard (2020)

**Sources:**
• Extraction (2020)
• Underground (2019)
• The Old Guard (2020)

sources.title: Extraction
sources.overview: A hardened gun-for-hire's latest mission becomes a soul-searching race to survive when he's sent into Bangladesh to rescue a drug lord's kidnapped son.

sources.title: Underground
sources.overview: Two brothers compete in the world's deadliest underground fighting tournament, where they must decide whether to play by the rules or to cast their honor aside and team up to bring down the dark syndicate running the tournament.

sources.title: The Old Guard
sources.overview: Four undying warriors who've secretly protected humanity for centuries become targeted for their mysterious powers just as they discover a new immortal.
